# Design System

A token-driven design system with a light/dark theme generated by symmetry. Built for developers and AI tools.

## Rules
- /CLAUDE.md: How to use the system. Reference semantic tokens, never raw hex. Define new tokens in both light and dark.

## Tokens
- /tokens/colors.json: Primitive palette (18 families, mode-agnostic).
- /tokens/semantic-light.json: Semantic roles for light mode.
- /tokens/semantic-dark.json: Semantic roles for dark mode (derived by symmetry).
- /tokens/THEMES.md: The light->dark symmetry rule (neutrals 105-step + black/white; chromatic 110-step; accent ramp shifts hue).
- /tokens/typography.json, spacing.json, shadow.json, icon.json: Type, spacing, radius, shadow, icon-size tokens.
- /dist/tokens.css: Compiled CSS custom properties (:root light + [data-theme="dark"]).

## Components (specs reference semantic tokens only)
- /components/button.md
- /components/pill.md
- /components/selection-controls.md
- /components/text-field.md
- /components/text-area.md
- /components/hyperlink.md
- /components/icons.md
